relics.name: Mutation Catalyst
relics.description: Card rewards are oceanabby:Mutated until you add 1 oceanabby:Mutated card to your deck.
relics.flavorText: TODO: make this a sweet relic.

relics.name: Snecko Spine
relics.description: Your first Attack each combat apples oceanabby:Acid equal to unblocked damage dealt.
relics.flavorText: For some reason, it still sways around hypnotically.

relics.name: Meat Bun
relics.description: Whenever you enter a ? room containing a combat, heal 20 HP.
relics.flavorText: A reward for good behavior. Contains scraps of previous test subjects.

relics.name: Paper Dragyn
relics.description: Upon pickup, obtain Paper Krane and Paper Phrog.
relics.flavorText: You've never seen a creature like this before...

relics.name: Eldritch Hieroglyphs
relics.description: Whenever you shuffle your draw pile, oceanabby:Mutate the top 4 cards
relics.flavorText: Depicts the wrath of Neow as her child was stolen from her.

relics.name: Perfected Catalyst
relics.description: Replaces Mutation Catalyst. Upon pickup, remove all oceanabby:Mutations from cards in your deck. Whenever you Smith a card, oceanabby:Evo it too.
relics.flavorText: Our research has only just begun...

relics.name: The Symbiont
relics.description: Eats the next 3 relics you obtain. At the start of your turn, if this relic is not hungry, gain [E] .
relics.flavorText: Despite its hideous appearance, it is nothing but a well-needed friend.

relics.name: Emergency Guide
relics.description: At the start of each combat, shuffle 2 oceanabby:Edible Marrows+ into your draw pile.
relics.flavorText: It's from the lab you escaped from. Describes protocol in the event of a containment breach

potions.name: Primordial Soup
potions.description: Choose 1 of 3 random Mutated cards to add to your hand, it costs 0 this turn.

potions.name: Ghost In No Jar
potions.description: Give any number of cards in your hand Haunted 8.

keywords.name: Acid
keywords.description: Creatures with Acid lose HP equal to their Acid at the start of their turn, then lose half their Acid.

keywords.name: Adaptation
keywords.description: Adaptations modify you for X turns.

keywords.name: Edible
keywords.description: A Mutation applied to a card. Edible cards grant [E] when played.

keywords.name: Evo
keywords.description: An extra upgrade to a card. Each card has a unique Evo.

keywords.name: Haunted
keywords.description: If a haunted card is in your hand at the end of turn, it is removed from your deck permanently and you lose X HP.

keywords.name: Mutate
keywords.description: Add a random positive small effect to a card.

keywords.name: Scab
keywords.description: Mutation is removed after the card is played.

keywords.name: Swift
keywords.description: A Mutation applied to a card. Swift cards draw 1 card when played.

keywords.name: Throb
keywords.description: Triggered upon Adapt and at the start of your turn.

mods.name: Aberrant (The)
mods.description: Revival of an old unfinished character mod originally started in 2019
